title: 教师授课质量多维度综合评分模型
subtitle: 评分、完课率、互动率、复购率 → 综合指标
businessGoal: 客观评价教师教学效果

chapters.title: 教师多维评分概览
chapters.content: 每位老师有评分、完课率、互动率、复购率 4 个指标，先总体查看。

codeExamples.title: 表
codeExamples.code:
import pandas as pd
df = pd.read_csv('sample-teachers.csv')
print(df)

selfCheckQuestions.question: 做综合评价的思路一般是？

chapters.title: Min-Max 归一化与加权总分
chapters.content: 将评分压缩到 [0,1]，与其他百分比指标同一维度，再按权重累加。

codeExamples.title: 综合评分
codeExamples.code:
import pandas as pd; import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
df = pd.read_csv('sample-teachers.csv')
df['rating_norm'] = df['rating_5'] / 5.0
w = {'rating_norm': 0.4, 'completion_rate': 0.25, 'interaction_rate': 0.15, 'repurchase_rate': 0.2}
df['total'] = df['rating_norm']*w['rating_norm'] + df['completion_rate']*w['completion_rate'] + df['interaction_rate']*w['interaction_rate'] + df['repurchase_rate']*w['repurchase_rate']
df = df.sort_values('total', ascending=False).reset_index(drop=True)
print(df[['teacher','total','rating_norm','completion_rate','interaction_rate','repurchase_rate']].round(3))
fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(9,5))
ax.bar(df['teacher'], df['total'], color='#2563eb')
ax.set_ylabel('综合得分'); ax.set_title('教师综合评分'); plt.tight_layout(); plt.show()

selfCheckQuestions.question: 不同量纲先归一化再加权是常见做法。
把 5 分制映射到 0-1，用 df['rating_5'] / ____

chapters.title: 雷达图
chapters.content: Matplotlib 的 polar 轴画雷达图，对比不同老师的多维度表现。

codeExamples.title: 雷达
codeExamples.code:
import numpy as np; import matplotlib.pyplot as plt; import pandas as pd
df = pd.read_csv('sample-teachers.csv')
df['rating_norm'] = df['rating_5']/5
labels = ['评分','完课率','互动率','复购率']; N = len(labels)
angles = np.linspace(0, 2*np.pi, N, endpoint=False).tolist()
fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(6,6), subplot_kw={'polar': True})
for _, row in df.iterrows():
    values = [row['rating_norm'], row['completion_rate'], row['interaction_rate'], row['repurchase_rate']]
    v = values + values[:1]; a = angles + angles[:1]
    ax.plot(a, v, 'o-', label=row['teacher']); ax.fill(a, v, alpha=0.1)
ax.set_thetagrids([a*180/np.pi for a in angles], labels)
ax.set_ylim(0, 1); ax.legend(loc='upper right', bbox_to_anchor=(1.25, 1.1))
plt.title('教师多维综合评价'); plt.tight_layout(); plt.show()

exercises.prompt: 计算每位教师的综合得分（评分 40% / 完课 25% / 互动 15% / 复购 20%）并排序。
exercises.starterCode:
import pandas as pd
df = pd.read_csv('sample-teachers.csv')
exercises.sampleAnswer:
df['rating_norm'] = df['rating_5']/5
df['total'] = 0.4*df['rating_norm'] + 0.25*df['completion_rate'] + 0.2*df['interaction_rate'] + 0.15*df['repurchase_rate']
out = df.sort_values('total', ascending=False).reset_index(drop=True)
print(out[['teacher','total','rating_5','completion_rate','interaction_rate','repurchase_rate']].round(3))

exercises.prompt: 输出各维度的平均，并用柱状图呈现。
exercises.starterCode:
import pandas as pd; import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
df = pd.read_csv('sample-teachers.csv')
exercises.sampleAnswer:
means = df[['rating_5','completion_rate','interaction_rate','repurchase_rate']].mean()
print(means.round(3))
means.plot(kind='bar', color=['#2563eb','#f97316','#16a34a','#8b5cf6'])
plt.ylabel('平均值'); plt.title('各维度平均分'); plt.xticks(rotation=20); plt.tight_layout(); plt.show()
